query:
-- All paid reservations for Wakeboardcenter experiences (using correct column names)
SELECT id, product_id, product_name, customer_name, customer_email, status, amount_total, booking_date, created_at
FROM reservations
WHERE product_id IN (30001, 30002, 30003, 30004, 30005, 30006, 30007, 30008, 90001)
AND status IN ('paid', 'confirmed', 'completed')
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
